comprehension.question: According to the speaker, what do great leaders have in common?
options: They all think, act, and communicate the same way
comprehension.hint_ja: 話者によると、偉大なリーダーの共通点は何ですか？

comprehension.question: According to the speaker, why is Apple more innovative than its competition?
options: Because they have the biggest budget
Because they hire the best talent
There is something else at play beyond resources and talent
Because they use the most advanced technology
comprehension.hint_ja: 話者によると、なぜAppleは競合他社より革新的なのですか？

emphasis_identification.sentence: People don't buy what you do, they buy why you do it.
emphasis_identification.question: Which word does the speaker emphasize most in this sentence?
emphasis_identification.hint_ja: この文で話者が最も強調した語はどれですか？

attitude_estimation.question: What is the speaker's overall tone in this segment?
attitude_estimation.hint_ja: この区間での話者の全体的なトーン（tone＝語調）は？
